description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The exterior features a mix of dark and light panels, large glass windows, and multiple outdoor spaces including a pool, patio, and rooftop terrace. The front entryway is accessed by a set of steps leading to a covered porch, and the property is enclosed by a light-colored fence. The house includes landscaped areas with grass and trees, and the rear side opens to a private backyard with additional seating and greenery. The overall structure emphasizes open-plan living with extensive use of glass for natural light and visual connection to the outdoors. The architectural style is distinctly modern, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on horizontal lines.
description: A modern two-story house with flat roofs, large glass windows, a pool, and multiple outdoor living spaces, all enclosed by a light fence. The design features clean lines, a mix of dark and light panels, and landscaped areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry steps, covered porch, pool, and a mix of dark and light exterior panels.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long horizontal windows, rooftop terrace, and the full length of the fenced property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, large glass doors, pool, and a tree providing shade.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional outdoor seating, a secondary entry, and the integration of landscaping with the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with steps, a covered porch, and a modern door integrated into a clean, minimalist facade
